array_types.name: TP_State
array_types.code: type TP_State is array (Touch_Identifier range <>) of TP_Touch_State;

record_types.name: TP_Touch_State

access_types.name: Any_Touch_Panel
access_types.code: type Any_Touch_Panel is access all Touch_Panel_Device'Class;

subprograms.name: Active_Touch_Points
subprograms.code:
function Active_Touch_Points (This : in out Touch_Panel_Device)
                              return Touch_Identifier

documentation.description: Retrieve the number of active touch points

subprograms.name: Get_All_Touch_Points
subprograms.code:
function Get_All_Touch_Points
  (This     : in out Touch_Panel_Device)
   return TP_State

documentation.description:
Retrieves the position and pressure information of every active touch
points

subprograms.name: Get_Touch_Point

documentation.description:
Retrieves the position and pressure information of the specified
touch

subprograms.name: Set_Bounds

documentation.description: Set screen bounds. Touch_State must should stay within screen bounds
